content_library.system-desc: Robust robot management and control interface for commercial robotics operations
content_library.owner-desc: Business owners who own robots, employ operators, and require fleet oversight with business intelligence
content_library.operator-desc: Field personnel employed by Owners to operate robots assigned to them with mission-focused capabilities
content_library.teleoperator-desc: Skilled remote pilots for complex operations requiring 1:1 human-to-robot control with advanced telemetry
content_library.fleet-teleoperator-desc: Specialists who oversee multiple autonomous systems simultaneously using zone-based management
content_library.customer-service-desc: Lucid Bots internal support team with diagnostic access and maintenance capabilities
content_library.operations-manager-desc: Lucid Bots fleet operations oversight with comprehensive system access and analytics
content_library.executive-desc: Strategic oversight roles requiring business intelligence and company-segmented data access
content_library.dashboard-desc: Primary operational interface showing real-time fleet status, key metrics, and alert notifications
content_library.fleet-management-desc: Comprehensive fleet operations interface with robot assignment, analytics, and coordination tools
content_library.mission-control-desc: Mission planning and execution interface with waypoint-based cleaning coordination
content_library.business-reports-desc: Executive dashboard with business intelligence, analytics, and performance metrics
content_library.teleoperation-interface-desc: Real-time robot control interface with live video feeds and telemetry overlay
content_library.diagnostics-dashboard-desc: Technical diagnostic interface with component health analysis and maintenance tools
content_library.fleet-status-map-desc: Interactive map displaying real-time robot locations, status indicators, and mission progress
content_library.robot-control-panel-desc: Direct robot operation controls with movement, mission execution, and emergency functions
content_library.metrics-overview-desc: Performance analytics dashboard showing fleet utilization, efficiency, and operational trends
content_library.alert-system-desc: Real-time notification system for maintenance alerts, emergencies, and operational events
content_library.mission-planner-desc: Waypoint-based mission planning tool with click-and-clean autonomous pathfinding
content_library.user-management-desc: User administration interface with role assignment and permission management
content_library.diagnostics-panel-desc: Component health monitoring with predictive maintenance and troubleshooting tools
content_library.real-time-status-desc: Live status updates for all fleet devices with <10s data freshness and automated alerts
content_library.robot-assignment-desc: System for owners to assign specific robots to designated operators with access control
content_library.fleet-analytics-desc: Advanced analytics for fleet performance, utilization, and business intelligence
content_library.mission-management-desc: End-to-end mission lifecycle from planning through execution and reporting
content_library.predictive-maintenance-desc: AI-powered component health analysis with failure prediction and scheduling
content_library.emergency-teleoperation-desc: Emergency intervention capabilities with immediate manual control takeover
content_library.voice-commands-desc: Natural language voice control for hands-free field operations
content_library.autonomous-pathfinding-desc: Edge-based navigation with obstacle avoidance and mission optimization
content_library.robot-model-desc: Core robot entity representing physical devices with operational data and status tracking
content_library.mission-model-desc: Mission data structure with waypoints, completion criteria, and performance metrics
content_library.user-model-desc: User account entity with roles, permissions, and device access patterns
content_library.telemetry-model-desc: Real-time operational data including position, battery, performance, and environmental sensors
content_library.alert-model-desc: Alert and notification system with severity levels, acknowledgment, and escalation rules
content_library.real-time-updates-req: System must provide operational data updates with <10s latency for 95% of cases
content_library.teleoperation-latency-req: Teleoperation control commands must have <200ms latency for safe operation
content_library.mobile-offline-req: Mobile interface must support 30-minute offline operation with essential functions
content_library.multi-tenant-req: System must support company-segmented data access with strict isolation
content_library.scalability-req: Platform must support current 1000 devices with growth to 10,000+ devices
content_library.ai-preservation-req: All existing AI capabilities must be preserved during v1 consolidation
content_library.robot-control-desc: Direct robot operation interface with movement controls, mission execution, and emergency functions
content_library.fleet-coordination-desc: Advanced fleet coordination interface for managing multiple robots across zones
content_library.quick-actions-desc: Quick access panel for common operations and emergency functions
content_library.robot-assignment-panel-desc: Interface for owners to assign robots to operators with permission management
content_library.status-indicator-desc: Visual indicator showing current robot status with color coding and alerts
content_library.device-health-monitoring-desc: Continuous monitoring of robot component health with predictive maintenance alerts
content_library.status-model-desc: Real-time status data for robots including location, battery, and operational state
content_library.robot-control-feat-desc: Core robot control capabilities including movement, mission control, and emergency functions

real-time-updates.name: Real-Time Updates
real-time-updates.acceptance_criteria: Data freshness <10s for 95% of operational updates

teleoperation-latency.name: Teleoperation Latency
teleoperation-latency.acceptance_criteria: Control command latency <200ms for safe operation

multi-tenant-data.name: Multi-Tenant Data Isolation
multi-tenant-data.acceptance_criteria: Company data strictly segregated with no cross-tenant access

ai-preservation.name: AI Capabilities Preservation
ai-preservation.acceptance_criteria: All existing AI capabilities maintained during v1 consolidation
